headline: Mother | Software Developer | Women Techmaker Ambassador | 🇵🇾 🇺🇸
intro: Hola! I’m Carmen 👋🏽, a software engineer with roots in Paraguay and a career shaped in the San Francisco Bay Area, CA. I focus on creating calm, intentional digital experiences that blend design, clarity, and thoughtful engineering.
intro_alt: I am a Software Developer born and raised in Asunción, Paraguay 🇵🇾, and based in the Bay Area, CA.🇺🇸
shortBio: Hola! I’m Carmen 👋🏽, a proud Paraguayan Software Developer based in the Bay Area, CA 🇵🇾 🇺🇸. Driven in agile environments, I have gained my full-stack expertise working in fast-paced start-ups accross Fintech, Health and Wellness, and HR.  I am actively pursuing courses to deepen my knowledge of AI and ML so that I can support my kid and his generation in facing tomorrow's (today) challenges.

In my spare time, I enjoy immersing myself in workshops and seminars focused on personal development. I love traveling the world, exploring new places, taking pictures in my walks / hikings, and cooking healthy meals. I cherish quality time with my son doing fun activities like Lego building, hiking and playing soccer and basketball. When I have some me-time, I indulge in reading, playing piano and/or practicing kickboxing.
shortBioI: Hola! I’m Carmen 👋🏽, a proud Paraguayan 🇵🇾 Software Developer based in the Bay Area, CA 🇺🇸. Skilled in agile, fast-paced start-ups across Fintech, Health & Wellness, and HR, I’m expanding my AI and ML knowledge to help my child and his generation tackle future challenges.

In my spare time, I dive into personal development workshops, love traveling, capturing moments on hikes, and cooking healthy meals. I treasure quality time with my son, building Legos, hiking, and playing sports. For myself, I enjoy reading, playing piano, and practicing kickboxing.
bio: Computers and sports battled for my attention growing up. I would often skip my English classes to hit the tennis courts. My love for soccer saw me playing for both of my universities, and I even played field hokey for a couple of years!

As the years went by, my curiosity grew stronger as I watched my oldest brother become increasingly immersed in technology. Before I knew it, I found myself eagerly waiting for him to leave for work or school, so I could secretly play on his computer.

Starting my tech journey in Paraguay was quite the adventure, especially as a woman in a field where you could hardly find any ladies around. Picture this: a traditional Catholic family, my dad's a military engineer, my mom's a dentist, and my brothers are all about engineering, just like dad. Chances were NaN 😅

Sticking to traditional gender roles was the norm in my home, so me diving into Software Engineering was kind of a big deal. But I was captivated by technology and its potential, so I secretly chased my dream with the help of my super hero Ñate (mi Mami), I studied for a business major at one university as my dad suggested, while surreptitiously studied a computer science-related career at another.

Today, driven by a profound sense of responsibility to understand and navigate the increasingly AI-driven world my child is growing up in, I actively pursue courses to deepen my knowledge of AI and ML to support him and their generation in the challenges of tomorrow.
mojo: I am bun in the oven! My mojo is "Never stop LEARNING because life never stop TEACHING".

workExperience.title: Software Engineering Consultant (Full-Stack Focus)
description: Partner with startups and small businesses to design and scale full-stack web applications, moving features from product definition through production using React, Next.js, and Ruby on Rails.
Design backend systems and APIs to support clean data integrations and secure multi-tenant workflows across product features.
Collaborate directly with founders, designers, and stakeholders to translate highly ambiguous business needs into clear, scalable technical features.

AI-Augmented Development: Leverage modern AI tools (including Gemini and Codex) to accelerate boilerplate implementation, streamline automated unit testing, and maintain focus on complex domain architecture and system edge cases.
Designed and delivered a K-8 AI education framework that simplified machine learning concepts, increasing program engagement by ~30%.
Co-led a technical mentorship initiative for 50 women in tech, guiding participants through cloud computing fundamentals in partnership with Google Cloud, Kuñatech, and SheWorks.

workExperience.title: Solutions Engineer
description: Integrated the Lokalise API with a Django-based backend framework to automate the extraction of hard-coded application assets, leveraging custom JSON and metadata configurations to streamline localized content delivery and launch features across the US and Canadian health markets.
Developed configurable frontend components backed by secure metadata configurations to make internal application setups faster and less error-prone.
Collaborated daily with product, design, and operations teams to launch new features within a secure wellness platform.

workExperience.title: Delivery Lead – Software Engineer
description: Designed and shipped 10+ RESTful APIs using Ruby on Rails and PostgreSQL to back core mobile scheduling and time-tracking features.
Integrated the Clover API with internal TimeClock systems, exposing real-time data visibility across 175,000+ business clients and improving operational efficiency by ~50%.
Built an HR engagement tool using Sidekiq background jobs that increased active user and employee participation by 33%.
Owned end-to-end feature delivery, moving from initial product requirements to deployment, collaborating alongside designers and product managers to ship scalable user-focused solutions.

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Built a backend data service using Ruby, Sidekiq, and the Eligible API to handle bulk employee data imports, saving health insurance providers an estimated 144 hours of manual data processing.
Built back-end logic for an eligibility detection tool, reducing data processing time by 60%.
Implemented Rails internationalization (I18n) to launch the platform's Spanish onboarding flow, expanding customer reach by ~14%.

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Re-engineered an auto insurance quote application using Ruby on Rails and React, successfully reducing quote response latency from 24 hours to under 3 minutes.
Integrated a third-party quote-generation API to create a more responsive customer purchasing flow, increasing overall application conversion by 50%.
